positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a whimsical forest creature—a fox with iridescent, butterfly wings and a bioluminescent tail—perched among giant, glowing moss and stylized, swirling abstract flora. The composition is centered and symmetrical, designed for a clean, high-contrast silhouette against a soft, deep twilight background. Use a palette of sapphire blues, emerald greens, and glowing gold accents. Style must mimic premium, modern watercolor etching combined with crisp vector art. Ensure clean lines, strong focal point, and excellent separation between subject and background elements for easy apparel printing. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, noise, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, realistic photography, photo-realistic, logos, typography, grain
